who: nurse practitioners in medical clinics processing 10-20 patient records per day
offer: For nurse practitioners in medical clinics processing 10-20 patient records per day, inefficient tracking of patient histories causes delayed care and mismanagement. We provide a tool that tracks patient medical history and generates personalized care plans instead of manual record-keeping and generic care plan templates.
problem: Difficulty in tracking comprehensive patient medical histories and generating personalized care plans.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for nurse practitioners
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to nurse practitioners with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among practitioners
try_it: Let users try manual entry of patient medical history
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
